text: Ingested extension documentation into global wiki tools pages: tiny-tool-shim, tight-web, wiki-memory.
Added tight ask_user structured clarification tool documentation to wiki.
Installed pi-tool-display and added compact rendering policy documentation to wiki.
Recorded tiny-model harness stack and next-step roadmap.
Added planned feature: tight planning tool similar to Claude Code planning, adapted for tiny models.
Added dependency-free tiny-tool-shim parser smoke tests, shared parser module, npm test script, and documentation; marked parser smoke tests done in tiny-model next steps.

Added tight-planning extension with /planning mode, Markdown active plan file, plan_create/read/update/complete tools, read-only planning guardrails, and auto-use planning guidance for broad or risky work.
Consolidated wiki storage into the canonical ~/.pi/agent/wiki directory, removed duplicate /Users/dan/.pi/wiki stub tree, and updated wiki-memory docs/code so all scopes resolve to the agent wiki.
Documented TinyPi as a standalone overlay repository for pi.dev rather than a fork; normal users should install pi normally and install TinyPi as an extension/config layer.
Added TinyPi local installer scripts and documented the easy clone/npm install/npm run install:local setup flow for users.
